MDCSWT.GroupRoll.Title: Group Trait Roll
MDCSWT.GroupRoll.NoBR2: Better Rolls 2 is not active — Group Trait Roll needs game.brsw.
MDCSWT.Arcana.EnableHint: Show a screen HUD, visible to all players, with every Major Arcana currently kept as an initiative card: the card art, who drew it, and its effect.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.CandidatesHint: Comma-delimited list of the characters who can receive bennies in the vote dialog.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.HandReminderHint: Reminder text shown at the top of the vote dialog. Leave empty to hide the banner.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.Activated: Benny Vote activated — polling every {minutes} minutes.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.DeactivatedDiscard: Benny Vote deactivated — pending poll discarded.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.NoCandidates: Benny Vote: no candidates configured. Set the candidate list in module settings.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.NoPlayers: Benny Vote: no active players — poll skipped.
MDCSWT.BennyVote.Prompt: Who do you think deserves a benny for their recent actions?
